Chair Rentals in Sydney Mines NS

Nova Kingdom Rentals is Bridgewater-based and delivers chair rentals to Sydney Mines NS, a Cape Breton community near the Cabot Strait known for its industrial heritage. Cape Breton's strong Celtic community spirit, summer festivals, and tight-knit neighbourhoods make it a natural destination for our inflatables, games, and party packages for birthdays, schools, and community events.

Travel from Bridgewater to Sydney Mines NS is approximately 280 km. The first 15 km is free; travel beyond that is quoted at $0.72/km (estimate ~$191 one way, confirmed before booking). Availability, setup suitability, staffing requirements, and deposit details are all confirmed before your booking is finalized.

Best For

  • Birthday and celebration seating
  • Community and church events
  • School events
  • Outdoor gatherings

Frequently Asked Questions

Do you rent tables and chairs for events in Sydney Mines NS?
Table and chair rentals can be delivered to Sydney Mines NS by availability and travel quote from Bridgewater, approximately 280 km away. Travel beyond the first 15 km is quoted at $0.72/km. Availability and final pricing are confirmed manually — we do not auto-confirm availability online.
How many chairs do you have available?
We currently have 15 black padded chairs in stock. White folding chairs are available by request from $3 each, and 6ft tables are available by request from $8 each. Quantities and availability are confirmed when you contact us.
What is the pricing for table and chair rentals?
Black padded chairs are $3 each (15 in stock). White folding chairs are available from $3 each by request. 6ft tables are available from $8 each by request. All pricing and availability are confirmed manually before booking.
Can I rent tables and chairs without renting an inflatable?
Tables and chairs are primarily offered as add-ons to inflatable rentals, foam parties, 360 Photo Booth bookings, and party packages. Standalone table and chair rentals may be available by quote — contact us to discuss your needs.
How far in advance should I book tables and chairs?
We recommend contacting us as early as possible, especially for summer and weekend dates. Availability is not guaranteed until confirmed by us and a deposit is received. Do not assume availability based on online forms alone.
